text.title: Zero-Click Search Landscape
text.summary: Current zero-click statistics, CTR impact data, and the strategic shift from traffic maximization to citation-based visibility.

list.item: 58.5% of US searches end without a click
59.7% of EU searches end without a click
83% zero-click rate when AI Overviews appear
Average site CTR drop: 34.5% when AI Overview present
Brands cited in AI Overviews: +35% more clicks than non-cited brands

rule.statement: Shift the primary goal from driving traffic to becoming the source AI answers cite — being cited in AI Overviews is more valuable than being a skipped organic link.
rule.rationale: In a world where 83% of AI Overview searches end without clicks, measuring success purely by sessions misses the actual value delivered. Brand awareness, citation authority, and downstream branded search growth are the real outcomes that convert.

list.item: Be the Source: create content AI cites → being the answer beats being a skipped link
Target Long-tail: complex nuanced questions where AI struggles with deep expertise
Brand Building: drive direct and branded traffic to bypass search dependency
Email Capture: build first-party data relationships not dependent on search
Community: Discord, Slack groups — build owned audience

rule.statement: Implement Article and FAQ schema markup — studies show +28% AI citation rate for pages with proper structured data.
rule.rationale: AI crawlers parse structured data to understand content purpose and authority signals. Structured data reduces ambiguity in content interpretation, making the page a more reliable citation candidate.

list.item: Article and FAQ schema: +28% AI citation rate
Content updated within 30 days: 3.2x more citations than stale content
Fast Core Web Vitals: crawler access and user experience signal
Entity consistency across platforms (same name/description everywhere)
Clean information architecture with logical URL hierarchy
